title: Design notes: Homage system
text: One family per page (A900/A700/A500/A300 → roles) Links + focus use AA tones; anchors reveal typographic dash hover Callouts tables use quiet A300 tints; code blocks use structural left ribbon

title: Design notes: Homage system
text: Families available: red, lapis, ochre, teal, green, violet. four tones: A900: links focus light mode; strongest contrast A700: highlights (one series per plot); nav active marker A500: borders, dash anchors, code ribbons, structural rules A300: tints callouts table stripe; links/focus dark mode

title: Design notes: Homage system
text: original Homage families favor single hue family per plot page. want different aesthetic (pulled grid image), use image-derived palettes scales. mirror API fully opt-. Sequential (image-based)  Diverging (image-based)  Notes - *_img scales opt-don’t change existing defaults. - neutral can set "#e5e7eb" (site border token) visual coherence pages. - Prefer original single-family scales quieter, unified look; reach image-derived diverging scales emphasize contrasts.
code: mtcars |>   ggplot(aes(wt, mpg, colour = hp)) +   geom_point(size = 2.2) +   labs(title = "Image-derived sequential (lapis)") +   albersdown::scale_color_albers_img("lapis", discrete = FALSE) df <- transform(datasets::faithful, centered = waiting - mean(waiting)) ggplot(df, aes(eruptions, centered, colour = centered)) +   geom_point(alpha = 0.9) +   labs(title = "Image-derived diverging (red <-> teal)") +   albersdown::scale_color_albers_img_red_teal(neutral = "#e5e7eb")

title: Design notes: Homage system
text: Links focus rings always meet AA. Move cursor H2/H3 reveal structural dash anchor. Style modes - style: minimal (default): lighter rules quieter dash language. - style: balanced: calibrated middle ground. - style: assertive: stronger edges emphatic structural marks.

title: Design notes: Homage system
text: TIP: Callouts use A500 border subtle A300 tint (≈8–10%). Keep short purposeful. code fence stays flat: drop shadow, A500 left ribbon compact copy control.
code: # a small, readable function foo <- function(x) if (length(x) == 0) NA_real_ else mean(x) foo(c(1, 2, 3))

title: Design notes: Homage system
text: Base HTML tables pick quiet A300 zebra stripe thin borders.

title: Design notes: Homage system
code: mtcars$grp <- ifelse(mtcars$cyl == 6, "highlight", "other") mtcars$grp <- factor(mtcars$grp, levels = c("other", "highlight")) ggplot(mtcars, aes(wt, mpg, color = grp)) +   geom_point(size = 2.2) +   albersdown::scale_color_albers_highlight(     family = params$family,     tone = "A700",     highlight = "highlight",     other_name = "other"   ) +   labs(title = "One highlighted series; others neutral",        subtitle = "A700 draws the eye; gray recedes",        x = "Weight (1000 lbs)", y = "MPG")

title: Design notes: Homage system
text: Getting started: articles/getting-started.html pkgdown template docs: reference/index.html Palette roles: #palettes

title: Albersdown: Getting started
text: vignette shows shared theme vignette CSS work together. Links focus rings use family’s accessible tone; callouts stripes use quiet tint.

title: Albersdown: Getting started
code: summary(mtcars$mpg) #>    Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max.  #>   10.40   15.43   19.20   20.09   22.80   33.90 mtcars |>   ggplot(aes(wt, mpg, color = factor(cyl))) +   geom_point(size = 2.2) +   labs(title = "Fuel efficiency vs. weight",        subtitle = "Albers theme demo", x = "Weight (1000 lbs)", y = "MPG")

title: Authors and Citation
text: Albersdown Authors. Author, maintainer.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Authors (2026). albersdown: Minimalist Theme Vignette Kit pkgdown R Markdown. R package version 1.0.0, https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/albersdown/.
code: @Manual{,   title = {albersdown: Minimalist Theme and Vignette Kit for pkgdown and R Markdown},   author = {Albersdown Authors},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 1.0.0},   url = {https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/albersdown/}, }

what: Minimalist Theme and Vignette Kit for pkgdown and R Markdown
title: Minimalist Theme and Vignette Kit for pkgdown and R Markdown
text: Minimalist theme vignette kit pkgdown R Markdown. One line theme pkgdown sites via template package. Vignettes ship local CSS CRAN-friendly offline builds. Helper functions ggplot2 gt align plots/tables house style.

title: Minimalist Theme and Vignette Kit for pkgdown and R Markdown
text: package meant live GitHub pinned consumers. Install pak: pak::pak(“-org/albersdown@v1.0.0”).

title: Minimalist Theme and Vignette Kit for pkgdown and R Markdown
text: pkgdown site theme _pkgdown.yml: template: package: albersdown DESCRIPTION: Config/Needs/website: -org/albersdown@v1.0.0 Vignettes (offline & styled) Create new vignette using “Albers Vignette” template (run albersdown::use_albers_vignettes()). skeleton includes: output: rmarkdown::html_vignette css: albers.css setup chunk: library(ggplot2) theme_set(albersdown::theme_albers(params$family, base_size = 13)) Retrofit existing package (replace prior theming) albersdown::use_albersdown( family = “red”, apply_to = “”, force_replace = TRUE ) Team one-liner (defaults ): albersdown::migrate_albersdown()

title: Minimalist Theme and Vignette Kit for pkgdown and R Markdown
text: theme_albers(family = “red”) scale_color_albers(family = “red”, discrete = TRUE, …) scale_fill_albers(family = “red”, discrete = TRUE, …) scale_color_albers_highlight(family = “red”, tone = “A700”, = “#9aa0a6”) scale_fill_albers_highlight(family = “red”, tone = “A700”, = “#9aa0a6”) gt_albers(x, family = “red”)

title: Minimalist Theme and Vignette Kit for pkgdown and R Markdown
text: Keep vignette CSS local satisfy CRAN’s -network rule. Pin release tag Config/Needs/website deterministic site builds.

what: Choosing a palette family per page
title: Minimalist Theme and Vignette Kit for pkgdown and R Markdown
text: Families: red, lapis, ochre, teal, green, violet. YAML, add: params: family: “red” setup, call: theme_set(albersdown::theme_albers(params$family)) plot text feels small, increase base_size (e.g., 13–14): theme_set(albersdown::theme_albers(params$family, base_size = 14)) Add body class CSS tokens switch family: cat(sprintf(’ document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded",function(){document.body.classList.add("palette-%s");}); ’, params$family))

title: Minimalist Theme and Vignette Kit for pkgdown and R Markdown
text: package uses albersdown theme. Existing vignette theme hooks replaced albers.css local albers.js render consistently CRAN GitHub Pages. palette family provided via params$family (default ‘lapis’). pkgdown site uses template: { package: albersdown }.

title: bs_theme for pkgdown (light/dark aware) — albers_bs_theme

title: bs_theme for pkgdown (light/dark aware) — albers_bs_theme
text: family Palette family name (default "red"). preset Visual preset (default "homage"). See albers_presets(). accent Primary accent color (default A700 chosen family). bg Background color (default derived preset). fg Foreground/text color (default derived preset).

title: Quiet, legible gt style with subtle stripe from A300 — gt_albers
text: x gt table family Palette family subtle accents preset Visual preset (default "homage"). See albers_presets(). base_size Base font size pixels (default 14). width Table width pixels (default 720). Use NULL auto. bg Override background color (default derived preset). fg Override text color (default derived preset).

what: Configure current package to use albersdown (back-compat wrapper) — use_albers_vignettes
title: Configure current package to use albersdown (back-compat wrapper) — use_albers_vignettes
text: wrapper preserves old name forwards use_albersdown().

title: Configure current package to use albersdown (back-compat wrapper) — use_albers_vignettes

what: One-shot setup for existing packages — use_albersdown
title: One-shot setup for existing packages — use_albersdown
text: Turn-key retrofit adopt albersdown theme existing package. Copies local assets CRAN-safe vignettes, ensures pkgdown template, optionally patches vignettes, writes README note, prints doctor report.

title: One-shot setup for existing packages — use_albersdown
code: use_albersdown(   family = "red",   preset = c("homage", "study", "structural", "adobe", "midnight"),   apply_to = c("all", "new"),   dry_run = FALSE,   fallback_extra = c("auto", "always", "never"),   force_replace = TRUE )

title: One-shot setup for existing packages — use_albersdown
text: family one : "red","lapis","ochre","teal","green","violet" preset Visual preset (default "homage"). See albers_presets(). apply_to "" patch every .Rmd/.qmd vignettes/, "new" add template assets dry_run TRUE, show changes without writing fallback_extra Controls copying site-wide fallbacks pkgdown/: "auto": copy pkgdown/extra.css pkgdown/extra.js consuming package use template: { package: albersdown } _pkgdown.yml. "always": always copy pkgdown/ (useful safety net custom setups). "never": never copy site-wide fallbacks. force_replace TRUE (default), overwrite existing albersdown assets replace existing vignette CSS/header hooks albersdown becomes active theme.
